Recommendations.Description: Strategy 'MixedDual' is dominant with 97% aggregate win rate.
Evidence: Wins 97% of all matchups against other strategies.
Recommendations.Rationale: A healthy metagame requires that no single strategy dominates all others. Examine which units this strategy relies on and consider increasing their cost or reducing their stats.

Recommendations.Description: Strategy 'MixedDual' has no counter — beats 16 strategies, loses to none.
Evidence: Beats: AllSpend, ArcherDual, ArcherMonkSpend, ArcherRush, ArcherTurtle, LancerMonkSpend, LancerRush, LancerTurtle, MixedRush, MixedTurtle, PawnGather, PawnIdle, WarriorDual, WarriorMonkSpend, WarriorRush, WarriorTurtle
No strategy achieves >60% win rate against this agent.
Recommendations.Rationale: Every strategy should have at least one viable counter for healthy metagame diversity.

Recommendations.Description: MONK may be under-performing: 42% win rate when produced (mean=52%).
Recommendations.Rationale: Decreasing MONK cost by 15% would improve its cost efficiency.
